title: Kaspersky
description: The Kaspersky connector imports threat intelligence from the Kaspersky Threat Intelligence Portal into OpenCTI via its API. It retrieves report PDFs, Indicators of Compromise (IOCs), and YARA rules published on the portal, creating structured STIX objects in OpenCTI. Requires an active Kaspersky Threat Intelligence Portal license.
short_description: Imports threat reports, IOCs, and YARA rules from the Kaspersky Threat Intelligence Portal into OpenCTI. Requires a Kaspersky TI license.
